overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban downtown. The character moves from a sunlit sidewalk under a yellow pedestrian overpass into dense commercial districts filled with holographic billboards, crossing through City Center and Corpo Plaza areas with heavy pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in white clothing along the sunlit sidewalk toward a yellow overpass structure

notable_agents.action: person in white coat walking ahead of the camera at a steady pace

entered.detail: large yellow metal pedestrian overpass spanning across the street ahead
tall futuristic glass building rising behind the overpass
bright orange metal guardrails separating sidewalk from the street
tall structure with multiple digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day in a futuristic city, walking along a concrete sidewalk bordered by orange safety railings. Parked vehicles line the street to the left while a distinctive yellow pedestrian bridge looms ahead. The camera follows a pedestrian in white clothing toward the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area under yellow pedestrian bridge

events.description: entering the shadow of the yellow pedestrian bridge, creating dappled lighting and darker atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered bridge structure, passing concrete pillars and trash piles on the right

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera from under the bridge

entered.detail: thick concrete columns supporting the yellow bridge overhead
staircase with yellow railings leading up to the pedestrian bridge
bags of garbage and debris accumulated against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered area beneath the yellow pedestrian bridge, where sunlight filters through creating dramatic shadows. Concrete support pillars line the path, and a yellow staircase structure is visible to the right. The lighting shifts significantly as the camera moves from bright sun into the sheltered underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with heavy neon signage

events.description: exiting the covered bridge into the open City Center district with dense holographic billboards and advertisements
crossing the street at a crosswalk marked with yellow stripes, entering the main commercial area

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic, then continuing along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic teal-colored car driving along the street

entered.detail: large glowing digital advertisements and holographic displays covering building facades
floating text indicator marking the City Center district
broad pedestrian crossing marked with thick yellow lines

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a vibrant commercial district bathed in sunlight and neon. The character crosses a wide street marked with yellow crosswalk stripes, surrounded by towering holographic billboards and futuristic vehicles. The City Center indicator appears as the environment becomes densely packed with digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with benches and digital kiosks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the busy sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and street furniture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright green shirt walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: modern concrete benches with orange lighting accents along the right side
tall turquoise and red digital terminal with glowing screens
tropical palm trees lining the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a bustling commercial sidewalk lined with modern benches and digital kiosks. Neon advertisements tower overhead while palm trees are visible further down the street. The pedestrian traffic increases with people walking in both directions, and the architecture features a mix of glass facades and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: Corpo Plaza intersection with wide crosswalks

events.description: entering the Corpo Plaza district marked by floating text, with wider streets and more open space
crossing the wide intersection at Corpo Plaza with yellow striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at the Corpo Plaza intersection, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: floating holographic text indicating the Corpo Plaza district
distinctive modern building with geometric glass facade

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Corpo Plaza district, marked by floating holographic signage. The environment opens up into a wider plaza area with broad crosswalks marked by yellow stripes. The character crosses the intersection alongside other pedestrians, with modern glass buildings and palm trees visible in the background, while vehicles pass by on the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit sidewalk through a sheltered underpass and into a densely packed futuristic commercial district. It begins by following a pedestrian in white clothing along a concrete path bordered by orange railings toward a looming yellow pedestrian bridge. As the camera enters the covered area beneath the bridge, the bright daylight shifts into dramatic shadows cast by concrete support pillars and staircases. The scene then opens back into the sunlight of the City Center, where the camera crosses wide yellow stripes amidst towering holographic billboards and futuristic vehicles. Finally, the movement flows into the Corpo Plaza district, transitioning from bustling sidewalks with digital kiosks and palm trees into a wide, open plaza characterized by floating holographic signage and modern glass architecture.
